full_text:
Zhang Xiang (Yuanfeng) 張翔 (元鳳)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xiang (張翔), styledYuanfeng (元鳳), was born in Julu. Agreed to take Xu Jing’s letters back north but threw them away when Xu Jing refused to serve Cao Cao. Zhang Xiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
